name: Sweet Noodle Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup light brown sugar, firmly packed
20 ounces canned crushed pineapple, well drained
16 ounces fine egg noodles, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Coat a 10-inch Bundt pan or tube pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Sprinkle brown sugar evenly in the bottom of the pan.
4. Place cherries evenly over the brown sugar.
5. Pour melted butter evenly over the cherries.
6. In a large bowl, beat eggs, sour cream, granulated sugar, vanilla, and salt until well blended.
7. Stir in crushed pineapple, then drained noodles.
8. Pour mixture into pan evenly.
9. Bake for 70 minutes or until center is set and top is lightly browned.
10. Allow to cool for 20 minutes; invert gently onto a serving platter.
Serves: 12 to 14
Notes:
- Run knife around the edges of the pan to help loosen it.
- Be careful when inverting because it will still be hot!
